homeHero.tagline: A new opportunity for fighters, a new level for fans — live and on demand.
homeHero.playLiveHint: Click to start the live broadcast

hero.title: Apply as a fighter
hero.body:
The Elite Fight Universe (EFU) Reality is about building the next EFU fighter generation.
Pro coaching, media exposure, an EFU Fight Night slot and a 10,000,000 HUF grand prize await.
Fill in the form — apply now!

sportMult.label: Athletic background
sportMult.placeholder: E.g. 5 years MMA, 3 years boxing, prior tournaments…

motivation.label: Motivation
motivation.placeholder: Why do you want to join EFU Reality? (min. 20 characters)

videoOrSocialUrl.label: Video or social link
videoOrSocialUrl.hint: YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook or Vimeo link

contact.label: Contact
contact.hint: Email or phone — we will get back to you

gdpr.consent: I consent to Elite Fight Universe (EFU) processing the personal data I provide for the purpose of evaluating my application and contacting me. The legal basis is Article 6(1)(a) of the GDPR (voluntary consent). EFU treats the data confidentially and does not pass it on to third parties.

success.title: Your application has been received!
success.body: Thank you! Our team will review your submission and get back to you at the contact you provided.

error.summary: Please correct the fields highlighted in red and try again.
error.name.too_short: Name must be at least 2 characters.
error.name.too_long: Name must be at most 80 characters.
error.city.too_short: City must be at least 2 characters.
error.city.too_long: City must be at most 80 characters.
error.sportMult.too_long: Athletic background must be at most 500 characters.
error.motivation.too_short: Motivation must be at least 20 characters.
error.motivation.too_long: Motivation must be at most 1500 characters.
error.videoOrSocialUrl.required: Please provide a video or social link.
error.videoOrSocialUrl.too_long: Link must be at most 500 characters.
error.videoOrSocialUrl.invalid: Only YouTube, Instagram, TikTok, Facebook or Vimeo links are accepted.
error.contact.invalid: Please provide a valid email or phone number.
error.contact.too_long: Contact must be at most 120 characters.
error.gdprConsent.required: GDPR consent is required to submit.
error.turnstile_failed: Bot check failed — please reload the page.

form.disclaimer: EFU uses your data solely for processing your application. You may withdraw your GDPR consent at any time.
